# CWE-552 positive: contract upload chmod world-readable (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-552-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func SaveContractUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseMultipartForm(32 << 20)
	file, hdr, err := r.FormFile("contract")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	defer file.Close()
	dest := filepath.Join("/srv/contracts", hdr.Filename)
	out, err := os.Create(dest)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, file)
	_ = out.Close()
	_ = os.Chmod(dest, 0o777)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
